To determine how many points you earn in the video game, we start by analyzing the situation:

- **Total enemies in the level:** 11

$$
\text{Points earned} = \text{Enemies destroyed} \times \text{Points per enemy} = 8 \times 9 = 72
$$

---

$$

$$

So, the points earned are:

$$
99 - 27 = 72
$$

---

**Final Answer:**  
$$
\boxed{72}
$$
